name_cn:
DIOR‚Ě§ÔłŹTOUJOURS Handbag [Small Pink]
This Dior Toujours handbag made a stunning appearance at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a casual and practical design. Crafted from pink calfskin, it is detailed with oversized woven stitching. The spacious interior compartments with a small pocket keep daily essentials neatly organized. It features a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure and adjustable sides to elevate the style. The leather handle has adjustable details for easy carrying.
CD Lock and strap closure
DIOR charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2822
Size: 23x15x15cm.
